body: Each Morphine voice is drawn from up to 128 harmonics. Harmonic breakpoints let you store multiple spectral snapshots and morph between them over time, so a single note can evolve from thin to full or shift timbre as it sustains.

Imported WAV/AIFF audio is converted into editable harmonics for resynthesis, and up to 128 keyboard zones can hold different sounds across the range - useful for multisampled instruments or split layers. A noise generator adds untuned attack transients.
